expectations.text: pre-commit hook 已安装在 .githooks/ 目录
expectations.evidence: outputs/pre-commit exists with full branch-protection logic. response.md Step 2 confirms install-git-hooks.sh ran and produced 'core.hooksPath = .githooks'. metrics.json files_created lists '.githooks/pre-commit'.
response.md Step 3: 'docs/reference/git-workflow.md 已创建 ✅'. metrics.json files_created lists 'docs/reference/git-workflow.md'. outputs/git-workflow.md is present and complete.

expectations.text: CLAUDE.md 中追加了对 docs/reference/git-workflow.md 的链接引用
expectations.evidence:
outputs/CLAUDE.md contains appended section: '## Git 工作流
分支命名规范、保护规则与合并流程详见 [docs/reference/git-workflow.md](docs/reference/git-workflow.md)。' — a link to the correct path.

expectations.text: CLAUDE.md 的引用只是索引链接，没有把完整 git 规范内容写进去
expectations.evidence: outputs/CLAUDE.md appended section is 2 lines: a heading and a single sentence with a link. No branch tables, hook instructions, or commit format content was inlined into CLAUDE.md. The full content lives in git-workflow.md.

claims.claim: User was asked before updating CLAUDE.md and confirmed
claims.evidence: response.md Step 4: '用户确认更新 CLAUDE.md → 追加 "## Git 工作流" 引用段落（仅索引，无完整内容）✅'

claims.claim: The pre-commit hook content is identical to the with_skill run in eval-basic-setup
claims.evidence: Comparing both pre-commit files: same script with merge-aware logic for main (staging/release/*) and staging (feature/*, fix/*, chore/*, doc/*). Consistent use of the canonical template.

suggestions.assertion: CLAUDE.md 中追加了对 docs/reference/git-workflow.md 的链接引用
suggestions.reason: This assertion checks that a link exists, but not that the original CLAUDE.md content was preserved. A buggy implementation could replace the file rather than append. Consider adding an assertion that the original content ('这是一个 Node.js 项目。') is still present in the updated CLAUDE.md.

eval_feedback.overall: Evals are solid. The distinction between 'link only' vs 'full content inlined' (assertion 5) is appropriately discriminating. One minor gap: no assertion verifies the existing CLAUDE.md content was not clobbered during the append.
